senses.gloss: apple of Sodom (Calotropis procera) as well as crown flower (Calotropis gigantea), milkweed (the genus Calotropis, which has only these two species and Calotropis acia in India)

etymology.text:
From the root ع ش ر (ʕ š r); compare عَشَرَة (ʕašara, “ten”).

From the root ع ش ر (ʕ š r), perhaps in the sense of association because the fibrous plant yields cordage for medicinal purposes.
